abilities.description: Create a token that's a copy of another target nonlegendary creature you control, except it has haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.

effect.description: Create a token that's a copy of another target nonlegendary creature you control, except it has haste. Sacrifice it at the beginning of the next end step.
effect.name: CopyPermanent

abilities.target_prompt: Select another target nonlegendary creature you control
